# Shivam Thakur — Full Stack Developer

> Shivam Thakur is a full-stack developer who designs and builds fast, scalable web
> applications end to end with React, Next.js and Node.js. This site is his portfolio:
> case studies of shipped products, the services he offers, and practical articles on
> modern web development. The whole site is static HTML.

## About

- Name: Shivam Thakur
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Core stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Stripe, WebSockets
- Focus: full-stack web apps, API and backend development, frontend engineering, web performance and SEO
- Availability: open to freelance and contract work
- Contact: hello@shivamthakur.me
- Homepage: https://shivamthakur.me/

## Case Studies

- [Case Studies overview](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies.html): index of selected projects with problem, solution and measurable results.
- [Drone Startup Platform](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies/drone-startup-platform.html): full-stack SaaS for a drone startup — fleet management and live telemetry over WebSockets; 40% faster onboarding, <200ms API p95.
- [Real-Time Analytics Dashboard](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies/realtime-analytics-dashboard.html): Next.js + WebSockets dashboard with sub-second live updates and virtualized charts handling millions of data points.
- [Headless E-commerce Storefront](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies/ecommerce-headless-storefront.html): headless Next.js + Stripe storefront — statically generated, sub-second loads, ~25% conversion lift.

## Services

- [Services overview](https://shivamthakur.me/services.html): full list of what Shivam offers.
- [Web Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/web-development.html): full-stack web apps built end to end with React, Next.js and Node.js.
- [Web Design](https://shivamthakur.me/services/web-design.html): modern, responsive UI/UX and design systems.
- [API & Backend Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/api-backend-development.html): REST and GraphQL APIs, auth, data modelling, scalable Node.js architecture.
- [Frontend Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/frontend-development.html): pixel-accurate, accessible, high-performance React interfaces.
- [Performance & SEO](https://shivamthakur.me/services/performance-seo.html): Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, structured data, and AEO/GEO signals.

## Blog

- [Blog overview](https://shivamthakur.me/blog.html): articles on full-stack development.
- [Scaling Node.js APIs to Handle 10x Traffic](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/scaling-nodejs-apis.html): profiling, database fixes, Redis caching, clustering and load testing.
- [React Performance Optimization: A Practical Checklist](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/react-performance-optimization.html): profiling, wasted re-renders, memoization, virtualization and code splitting.
- [REST vs GraphQL: Choosing the Right API Style](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/building-rest-vs-graphql.html): trade-offs in over-fetching, caching, versioning and team fit.
- [Deploying Full-Stack Apps on Vercel the Right Way](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/deploying-fullstack-on-vercel.html): environments, serverless functions, ISR caching and preview deployments.
